blockers.description: Human UAT requires live Jira OAuth token (from Phase 1 flow) + running Docker
blockers.workaround: Run docker compose up, complete OAuth via /api/auth/login, then test

blockers.description: backend/.env contains secrets — must never be committed
blockers.workaround: File is gitignored; stage only specific files

human_actions_pending.action: Commit uncommitted code (4 source files + 3 CSS/module files)
human_actions_pending.context: NoProjectPage search UX, JQL subtask change, GET /api/bugs endpoint, DashboardPage bug table — all uncommitted
Requires Docker running and valid OAuth token in DB from Phase 1

decisions.decision: Atlassian OAuth 2.0 (3LO) over Basic Auth modal
decisions.rationale: Required for future API access + better UX

decisions.decision: Token encrypted with Fernet at rest in SQLite oauth_tokens table
sessionStorage for user display cache, SQLite for auth persistence
decisions.rationale: sessionStorage cleared on tab close; SQLite token survives browser close

decisions.decision: NoProjectPage: show project list only when search query non-empty
decisions.rationale: Reduces visual noise on load; user-requested UX improvement

decisions.decision: JQL includes Bug subtasks via subTaskIssueTypes() + parent constraint
decisions.rationale: User wants both top-level bugs and bug subtasks; avoids fetching all subtask types
Dashboard loads cached data without re-syncing; read vs write separation

decisions.decision: Bug table uses inline styles (not CSS module)
decisions.rationale: Consistent with existing DashboardPage style pattern

next_action: Commit uncommitted source files: `git add backend/routers/sync.py backend/services/jira_sync_service.py frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.jsx frontend/src/pages/NoProjectPage.jsx frontend/src/pages/NoProjectPage.module.css` then commit. Then run human UAT from 02-HUMAN-UAT.md.
context_notes: Phase 2 code is fully automated-verified (8/8).
